title: mikania haenkeana
intro: Mikania haenkeana, also known as He Huan Hua, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is a member of the mint family and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mikania haenkeana include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
